rulings.Case Title: RICHARD C. BAKER VS. CLIMB REAL ESTATE GROUP, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 15, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTS CLIMB REAL ESTATE GROUP, INC. and MELODY HULTGREN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for fraud, negligent misrepresentation and breach of duty to disclose for Plaintiff to allege recoverable damages. See Kruse v. Bank of America (1988) 201 Cal.App.3d 354 and Gravillis v. Coldwell Banker (2006) 143 Cal.App.4th 761. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to causes of action for negligence and breach of fiduciary duty as defendant's argument is not supported by any authorities on point and defendant fails to explain how authorities cited are relevant to these causes of action. See Points and Authorities 2:11.= (501/AJR)
